title: Extract Meeting Dates
scenario: Extract meeting dates from the following meeting schedule: Meeting 1: 2022-01-15, Meeting 2: 2022-02-14, Meeting 3: 2023-03-12. The output should be a comma-separated list of dates.
constraints: Must use a standard date format

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets the character and format constraints.
Verify if the extracted dates are in a standard format (YYYY-MM-DD).
